user_visible_status: This is a manual source snapshot plan only; users still cannot see real major-country timetable data from these artifacts alone.

manual_snapshot_groups.user_visible_goal: Users should be able to see whether Japan Racing Association can provide meeting date, first race time, and per-race times for this country/system before any public timetable claim is made.

one normalized sample record
source URL trace
confirmation that no odds/payouts/predictions/tips are included
